summary: Comprehensive frontend E2E testing completed for production deployment readiness. Tested login flows, portal rendering, RBAC, and critical UI components across 9 portals. CRITICAL RBAC VIOLATION FOUND: Outlet Manager can access Admin portal. Backend rate limiting (429 errors) is very aggressive, causing API failures during normal navigation.

critical_bugs.issue: Aggressive rate limiting (429 Too Many Requests) triggered during normal page navigation. Frontend has retry logic (3 attempts, 2s delay) but still fails frequently.
critical_bugs.impact: Pages fail to load data, showing empty states or loading spinners. Affects user experience significantly during normal usage.
critical_bugs.evidence: Console logs show repeated 429 errors: 'Rate limited (429). Retrying in 2000ms... {attempt: 1, maxAttempts: 3}'

rbac_data_issue.issue: OUTLET_MANAGER role has permissions starting with 'admin.' prefix: 'admin.loyalty.read', 'admin.loyalty.analytics.read', 'admin.loyalty.manage_customers'
rbac_data_issue.impact: CRITICAL RBAC VIOLATION - Outlet Manager can access /admin portal because frontend RBAC checks if any permission starts with 'admin.'
rbac_data_issue.root_cause: Permission naming design flaw in /app/backend/seed/seed_demo.py lines 117-119. OUTLET_MANAGER role includes 'admin.loyalty.*' permissions which trigger frontend RBAC to grant admin portal access. Frontend RequirePortal guard checks: perms.some(p => p.startsWith('admin.')) which matches 'admin.loyalty.read'
rbac_data_issue.evidence: Outlet Manager successfully navigated to /admin/users, saw Admin sidebar with Dashboard and Loyalty Program options
rbac_data_issue.recommended_fix: Rename permissions from 'admin.loyalty.*' to 'loyalty.admin.*' or 'outlet.loyalty.admin.*' to avoid namespace collision with admin portal permissions. Update seed_demo.py OUTLET_MANAGER role and re-seed database.

critical_bugs.issue: RBAC VIOLATION: Outlet Manager (alt.manager@torado.id) can access /admin/users and Admin portal
critical_bugs.root_cause: Permission naming design flaw: OUTLET_MANAGER role in seed_demo.py (lines 117-119) includes 'admin.loyalty.read', 'admin.loyalty.analytics.read', 'admin.loyalty.manage_customers'. Frontend RequirePortal guard checks perms.some(p => p.startsWith('admin.')) which matches these permissions, granting unintended admin portal access. Frontend RBAC logic is working as designed - the permission naming is wrong.
critical_bugs.reproduction: 1. Login as alt.manager@torado.id / Torado@2026, 2. Navigate to /admin/users, 3. Page loads successfully showing Admin sidebar and user management UI (should redirect to /no-access)
critical_bugs.screenshot: Shows Outlet Manager on /admin/users page with Admin sidebar visible

performance_issues.issue: Rate limit retries cause slow page loads and poor UX
performance_issues.affected_routes: All portal pages that fetch master data (outlets, brands, notifications, approvals)
performance_issues.impact: Pages take 6+ seconds to load due to 429 retries, some data never loads
performance_issues.recommendation: Backend should increase rate limits for authenticated users, or frontend should implement better caching/request batching

passed_tests: Token correctly stored in localStorage as 'aurora_access_token'
Login redirects to /portal-select showing 8 portals (Owner, Executive, Outlet, Procurement, Inventory, Finance, HR, Admin)
Inventory portal (/inventory) renders successfully (1774 chars content)
Outlet portal (/outlet) renders successfully (1287 chars content)
Admin portal (/admin) renders successfully (1051 chars content)
Data Management (/admin/data-management) renders successfully (1055 chars content)
Finance Manager correctly sees Finance nav
Finance Manager correctly blocked from Admin portal (redirected to /no-access)
Outlet Manager correctly sees Outlet nav

critical: FIX RBAC PERMISSION NAMING: In /app/backend/seed/seed_demo.py lines 117-119, OUTLET_MANAGER role has 'admin.loyalty.read', 'admin.loyalty.analytics.read', 'admin.loyalty.manage_customers'. Rename these to 'loyalty.admin.read', 'loyalty.admin.analytics.read', 'loyalty.admin.manage_customers' (or 'outlet.loyalty.admin.*') to avoid namespace collision with admin portal. Update all references in codebase and re-seed database.
VERIFY RBAC AFTER FIX: After renaming permissions, test that Outlet Manager is redirected to /no-access when accessing /admin routes, and that loyalty admin features still work correctly.

REDUCE RATE LIMITING: Backend rate limits are too aggressive for normal usage. Increase limits for authenticated users or implement per-user rate limiting instead of per-IP. Current limits cause 429 errors on /api/auth/me, /api/master/outlets, /api/master/brands during normal page navigation.
high: CHECK OTHER ROLES: Review all role permissions in seed_demo.py for similar naming issues. Ensure no other roles have unintended portal access due to permission prefix collisions.
Test remaining features: Tours (help-tour-button functionality), PR creation form, Finance reports export buttons, all other portal routes listed in test plan
Verify RBAC for all roles: After fixing permissions, test that Finance Manager, other Outlet Managers, and restricted roles cannot access Admin, and that each role only sees their permitted portals
medium: Investigate chart rendering warnings in console: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - affects Executive Analytics charts
Test Data Management Export/Import/Delete functionality (only UI was tested, not actual operations)

success_percentage.overall: 75% (major functionality works, but CRITICAL RBAC issue blocks production)

notes.testing_constraints: Browser automation crashed multiple times (SIGSEGV) in containerized environment, limiting comprehensive tour and interaction testing. Rate limiting made rapid navigation testing difficult.
notes.not_tested: Tours (help-tour-button → popover → tour steps with LANGKAH text), PR creation form validation, Finance reports export functionality, HR portal routes, remaining 20+ routes from test plan, Data Management actual export/import/delete operations
notes.environment: Production URL: https://zen-swartz-5.preview.emergentagent.com, Viewport: 1280x800, Backend shows extensive rate limiting (429 errors)
